description_long: This is a classic red coupe car with a convertible roof, featuring a sleek, elongated body and a low stance. The exterior is finished in a glossy, deep red paint with chrome accents on the front grille, bumpers, and side trim. The car has two doors and a spacious front windshield, with a pair of side mirrors and whitewall tires that add to its vintage appeal. The interior appears to be upholstered in a contrasting purple or magenta color, visible through the open roof. At the rear, there are two protruding black elements that resemble stylized tailpipes or decorative fins, connected by thin rods. The overall design suggests a mid-20th-century American coupe, blending retro aesthetics with a touch of playful exaggeration.
description: A glossy red vintage convertible coupe with chrome accents, whitewall tires, and a purple interior. The car features two doors and distinctive rear decorative elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the chrome grille, headlights, and windshield with visible purple interior.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the elongated body, open convertible roof, and whitewall tires.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the trunk, taillights, and two black protruding elements extending from the back.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with clear visibility of the open roof and rear decorative elements.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
